full_description: MoodTracker is a simple app that helps users monitor their emotions and track their mental well-being. It allows users to log their daily moods and view their progress over time. By using MoodTracker, you can identify patterns and trends in your emotions, gain insight into what triggers different moods, and develop strategies to improve your mental health. The app is easy to use and provides a straightforward way to track your emotions, making it a valuable tool for anyone looking to take control of their mental well-being.
